properties.name: voralpen_liechti
properties.label: Voralpen / Swiss plateau (Liechti 1994 validation)
properties.reference: Liechti & Neininger 1994 — ALPTHERM worked example (Swiss Nationals, May 1993). Pre-Alps + foreland feeding the convective day.
properties.source: hand-defined polygon bounded by the paper's ground stations (Payerne, Chasseral, Napf, Pilatus, Moleson); not an operational region
